description: Tracking note for an occasional slow calendar sync on Kelly West's personal account. Opening a problem record to monitor and confirm it is fully resolved.

Intermittent failure where the district student information system (SIS) does not load student profiles for a subset of 8th-grade students. Issue is reproducible roughly 1 in 5 attempts. Root cause suspected to be a database indexing issue introduced during the November maintenance window. Related to INC0001002.
short_description: Student profile load failure in SIS for 8th-grade cohort

description: Recurring problem where parent notification emails sent from the district system are sporadically flagged as spam by major email providers (Gmail, Outlook). Issue affects communication reliability for appointment reminders and counseling updates. Suspected misconfiguration of district SPF/DKIM records. Related to INC0001003.
short_description: Parent notification emails flagged as spam by external providers
